name: The Clubhouse Cleveland
address: 23800 Commerce Park Rd Suite M, Beachwood, OH 44122
about: The Clubhouse Cleveland is a premier indoor golf training facility and simulator course in Beachwood, Ohio. It features a 1,000 square foot putting green and four 18'x10' TrackMan simulators for year-round play and practice. The venue provides a range of services including private instruction, club fitting, and speed training programs. Memberships offer flexible access with options for annual and seasonal plans, while non-members can book sessions and attend leagues or special events. The facility is geared toward serious golfers looking for data-driven performance improvement in a controlled, indoor environment.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan technology for precise shot analysis
Year-round access to a climate-controlled facility with a 1,000 sq ft putting green
Data-driven coaching using TPI-certified instruction and V1 video analysis
Comprehensive speed training programs with TrackMan feedback and SpeedSticks
Flexible membership options and weekly leagues for golfers of all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of an on-site kitchen or food service.
No mention of a bar or alcohol service.

simulator_hardware.notes: Four 18'x10' TrackMan 4 simulators with advanced launch monitoring capabilities.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the facility also offers professional club fitting and services. The venue provides all necessary equipment for simulator sessions and lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed. The venue does not appear to have an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes in a simulator session can vary depending on the number of players and pace of play. Private sessions and league formats allow players to choose their time slot.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Clubhouse Cleveland offers junior golf lessons and programs, making it suitable for younger golfers. The facility is also available for children's birthday parties and events.
